name: Farming Simulator Starter
description: Top-down farming game with TileMap-based farm grid. Features crop growth stages (seed → sprout → mature → harvestable), tool system (hoe, water, harvest) with switching, day/night cycle tracking, inventory management, NPC shop for seeds/sales, stamina limiting daily actions, and seasonal crop availability.

projectStructure.project.godot: Project configuration with autoload singletons (DayManager, SeasonManager, InventoryManager)

scenes/.farm_world.tscn: Root scene with TileMap (farm_grid layer), Player node, NPCs, UI canvas
scenes/.player.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, StateMachine for tool usage
scenes/.crop.tscn: Area2D crop entity with 4 sprite frames for growth stages, Timer for growth cycle
scenes/.shop.tscn: NPC shop structure with Area2D (interaction zone), DialogueNode, ShopMenu child
scenes/.ui/inventory.tscn: CanvasLayer with GridContainer for inventory slots (seeds, crops, tools)
scenes/.ui/toolbar.tscn: CanvasLayer with HBoxContainer for 4 tool slots, current tool indicator
scenes/.ui/day_display.tscn: CanvasLayer Label showing day/season and time as HH:MM
scenes/.ui/shop_menu.tscn: PopupPanel with TabContainer (Buy/Sell), ItemList for seed prices, crop prices

scripts/.player.gd: Inherits CharacterBody2D. Handles WASD movement, tool switching (1-4 keys), tool use on left-click, stamina depletion per action, animation state
scripts/.farm_grid.gd: Inherits Node2D. Manages TileMap layer, stores soil state per tile (empty/planted/watered/harvested). Methods: plant(pos, seed_type), water(pos), harvest(pos, callback). Uses TileMap.get_cell_source_id(0, coords) for state tracking
scripts/.crop.gd: Inherits Area2D. Tracks growth_stage (0-3), growth_timer, current_seed_type. Signals: ready_to_harvest. Updates sprite frame based on growth_stage on _process(). Growth triggered by DayManager signal
scripts/.day_cycle.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Tracks current_day (int), current_hour (0-23), current_minute (0-59). Timer ticks every game second. Signals: hour_changed, day_changed, season_changed. Exposes get_current_season() -> String
scripts/.shop_manager.gd: Manages NPC shop. Defines SEED_PRICES dict {seed_id → gold_cost} and CROP_PRICES {crop_id → gold_cost}. Methods: buy_seed(seed_id), sell_crop(crop_id). Updates InventoryManager and player gold
scripts/.inventory.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Stores inventory as dict {item_id → count}. Methods: add_item(id, count), remove_item(id, count), has_item(id, count). Signals: inventory_changed
scripts/.stamina.gd: Node attached to player. Tracks stamina (0-100). Methods: use_stamina(amount) returns bool (success if stamina >= amount). Regenerates 1 point per 10 game-seconds when idle. Signals: stamina_depleted
scripts/.season_manager.gd: AutoLoad singleton. Tracks current_season (spring/summer/fall/winter). Maps seasons to available crops dict. Signals: season_changed. Called by DayManager every 30 days

assets/.tilesets/farm_terrain.tres: TileSet with farm tiles (grass, soil, water, planted-seed, sprout-stage1/2, mature-plant, harvested)
assets/.sprites/player.png: Spritesheet 96x96 with 4 directions, idle + animation frames
assets/.sprites/crops/: PNG spritesheets per crop (wheat, corn, carrot) with 4 growth stage frames each

preBuiltMechanics: TileMap grid-based planting system with per-tile state tracking
Crop growth cycle driven by day/time progression with sprite animation
Tool-based interaction system (hoe to till, water to irrigate, harvest to collect)
24-hour day cycle with day/season tracking (30-day seasons, 4 seasons/year)
Stamina resource limiting actions per day, regenerates when idle
NPC shop with buy/sell interface tied to inventory system
Seasonal crop availability (different crops grow in different seasons)
UI indicators for day/time, stamina, current tool, inventory slots
customizationPoints: Add more crop types with unique growth times and seasonal restrictions
Extend tool system: fertilizer for faster growth, pest control, scarecrows
Implement weather system (rain auto-waters, drought reduces growth)
Add animal husbandry: chickens, cows, sheep with their own growth/product cycles
Create quest/progression system (storyline NPCs, dialogue trees, milestones)
Add farm upgrades: larger plots, better tools, greenhouses for off-season crops
Implement market price fluctuation based on supply and season
Add decorative building system (fences, sheds, wells for aesthetic)
Create multi-player co-op farm sharing (local split-screen or networking)
Add save/load system with farm state persistence
examplePrompts: Add a scarecrow building that prevents crop loss to random events, costs gold to place
Create a fishing mini-game at the pond to earn money and fish items
Implement a growth speed multiplier for premium seeds that cost 2x gold
Add a greenhouse structure that allows winter crop growth
Create a delivery NPC that buys all harvested crops at end-of-day bonus price
Add a tractor tool that tills 3x3 area instead of single tile
Implement a drought event that kills crops unless watered daily
Create a farm level-up system granting passive bonuses (stamina regen rate, tool speed)
Add spouse NPC that appears after reaching farm goals, gives daily help bonus
Implement a festival calendar with special NPCs visiting on specific days
